game_name: King's Quest: Quest for the Crown

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this adventure game

special_mechanics.name: Point-and-Click Adventure Movement
special_mechanics.description: Character movement controlled via text commands and cursor navigation typical of Sierra adventure games

special_mechanics.name: Pseudo-3D Environment Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Character can walk behind objects on-screen, pioneering animation and depth perception in graphic adventure games

tier_notes: King's Quest I is a graphic adventure game from 1984, not a physics-focused platformer. Traditional movement physics parameters (velocity, acceleration, gravity) are not applicable to this genre. The game emphasizes puzzle-solving and inventory management over precise character movement mechanics.
